text:
On Tue, Dec 25, 2001 at 07:41:11AM -0800, Idar Tollefsen wrote:
>It has not been established wether this is spesific for the Alpha or

Ooh, look ... another big-endian vs little-endian problem, I'd guess.

Alan Eldridge
